case_title: ANDRESEN, ROBERT vs. CARUANA, FRANK GEORGE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDRESEN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CARUANA, FRANK GEORGE DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDRESEN, ROBERT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-30-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-06-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON OCT-06-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

9:35AM C/C FOR TRIAL ALL PARTIES PRERSENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WITNESS LENNY COHEN SWORN AND EXAMINED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT #1 PROOF OF SERVICE OF 3DAY NOTICE FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT #2 COPY OD 3DAY NOTICE FOR ID & EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT #3 LEASE AGREEMENT FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. COURT FINDS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF: RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 1670 MARKET ST. #33. RENTS AND DAMAGES $1,122.00. LEASE FORFEITED. ATTORNEY FEES $350.00. COST PER COST BILL TO BE FILED. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARUANA, FRANK GEORGE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1670 MARKET ST. #33 $1,122.00 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,472.00, LEASE FORFEITED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
